title: HOCHSTE® Airpure Pet Proud Carpet Freshener 500g Wild Country Flowers Scent Pet Odour Eliminator for Carpets, Rugs, and Upholstery Safe for Pets and Children Blue - 2 Pack
features: Deep odor elimination: Formulated with active odor neutralizers that break down pet smells at their source for long-lasting freshness.
Fresh floral fragrance: Leaves a pleasant Wild Country Flowers scent that lingers, keeping your home smelling fresh and clean.
Safe for homes with pets: Crafted with pet-safe ingredients and non-toxic materials, making it suitable for daily use around pets and children.
Easy and fast application: Sprinkle the powder directly onto carpets, rugs, or upholstery, wait a few minutes, and vacuum it away—no extra tools needed.
Versatile and multi-surface use: Ideal for use on carpets, rugs, pet beds, and fabric surfaces throughout the home to combat lingering odors.
description: Product description Airpure Pet Proud Carpet Freshener 500g is your go-to solution for removing tough pet odors and refreshing your home with a pleasant floral scent. Designed for households with pets, this easy-to-use powder penetrates deep into carpet and fabric fibers to eliminate unpleasant smells rather than just masking them. Using advanced odor-neutralizing agents, the formula effectively tackles embedded pet odors and other household smells, including food, dampness, or musty areas. After sprinkling, simply allow the product to rest for a few minutes, then vacuum it up to reveal a fresher, cleaner home. It’s a fast, low-effort way to maintain a welcoming environment, especially before hosting guests or during seasonal clean-ups. The Wild Country Flowers scent provides a subtle but lasting fragrance that brightens up your living space, making it feel cleaner and more comfortable. Whether you’re freshening carpets, rugs, upholstery, or pet beds, Airpure delivers professional-grade results with ease. Proudly made in Britain, the Airpure Carpet Freshener is 100% vegan, cruelty-free, and safe to use around pets and children. It comes in a convenient 500g shaker-style container for mess-free application. Designed for versatility, safety, and performance, this carpet freshener is essential for any pet-friendly home. Directions Sprinkle the powder directly onto carpets, rugs, or upholstery, wait a few minutes, then vacuum it away.
